description: Composition Army print pants made of 100% cotton, with a zippered and button closure, waist elasticated at the back, loops on the waist, two buttoned flap pockets on the right leg and one flap button on the left leg with graphic print above it, and has two mock flap pockets at the back Fitting Boot cut Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print dress your little boy in this pant, hand him a toy machine gun, smear his cheeks with black and green skin paint and watch him turn into the saviour of the land from behind the trees in your garden in this smart army print pants from doodle. Team this with a white t-shirt and sandals when he’s out to play.
